mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, nickname, phone, email, avatar, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET nickname = #{nickname}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, avatar = #{avatar}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
